# Citation Guide

## To Cite This Project

If you use `srt-slurm-recipes` in a publication, please cite it as follows
(BibTeX entry for LaTeX):

```tex
@misc{srt_slurm_recipes,
  title        = {srt-slurm-recipes: Official sweep configurations for benchmarking LLMs on NVIDIA GPUs},
  author       = {{NVIDIA srt-slurm-recipes Maintainers}},
  year         = {2026},
  howpublished = {\url{https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm-recipes}},
}
```

## Upstream Reference

The recipe and benchmarking methodology in this repository builds on the
InferenceX project. If you reference the methodology, please also cite:

```tex
@misc{inferencex,
  title        = {InferenceX},
  author       = {{SemiAnalysis AI}},
  howpublished = {\url{https://github.com/SemiAnalysisAI/InferenceX}},
}
```

See also the upstream tool [NVIDIA/srt-slurm](https://github.com/NVIDIA/srt-slurm).
